title: salvia sclarea var. calostachya
intro: Salvia sclarea var. calostachya, also known as Clary Sage, is a variety of the Salvia sclarea plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been shown to aid in soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. The health benefits of Salvia sclarea var. calostachya include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, lower blood pressure, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues and stress relief. Salvia sclarea var. calostachya can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
